# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The dataset and extraction scripts are continually updated. We provide support and expect validation constraint checks against the **latest commit on the `main` branch**.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability within this project (e.g., injected malicious payload in a JSON file, or an insecure python dependency in the scrapers), please **do not** open a public issue.

Instead, please send an e-mail directly to the repository maintainers or use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting feature. We will acknowledge receipt of your vulnerability report within 48 hours and strive to resolve it immediately.
